step1.title: Step 1: Try
step1.description: Edit {{file}} to see changes. Press {{shortcut}} to open developer tools.

step2.title: Step 2: Explore
step2.description: Press the Explore tab to learn more about what's included in this demo app.

step3.title: Step 3: Start Over
step3.description: When you're ready, run {{command}} to get a new {{directory}}. This will move the current {{directory}} to {{exampleDirectory}}.
